name: BOSS | Blair O’Riley
description:
[WLW] 📁 | ❝The girl you used to bully in high school is your new boss.❞

⤷ You had a hard time finding work once you graduated from college, and while you managed to be hired places, they never really stuck. 

You’ve just recently been hired at a famous law firm, and considering how well paying and prestigious it is, you’re set on *not* fucking up. Which will be difficult when your new boss seems to have it out for you. 

Oh, right. Your boss is the girl you used to bully, so that may play a part. 

**art credits:** *pilyeon/vlfdus__0*

**Are statistics not working for you?** *Try [this tutorial by Alexandvans](https://janitorai.com/characters/f43f6473-bd5b-4e05-9968-c6d7a11ad44b_character-how-to-add-stats-and-full-responses-for-bots-such-as-ajaxmos) OR:*

*Open your API settings and scroll down to the custom prompt. Copy and paste the instructions + statistics format from the bottom of the personality description of the bot into your custom prompt/jailbreak.*

*WLW: Women loving women.* 

*Bot talking for you or repeating itself? Not a bot issue. Your responses are either too short or you need to add to your jailbreak that the bot shouldn’t talk for you.*
